geographic_restrictions: Applicants must live or work in zip codes 19122, 19125, 19132, 19133, 19134, and/or 19140.
project_area: Support for arts and cultural projects in the Kensington neighborhood of Philadelphia, including performances or displays in partnership with community programs.
demographic_requirements: Priority given to BIPOC and underserved communities in Kensington.
eligibility_summary: Open to artists and creatives (individuals or collaborative groups) living or working in specified Kensington zip codes. Microgrants of $2,500–$8,000 will be awarded to 10–15 recipients for projects to be presented in summer 2026.
